text:
Yverdon-Sport FC, association football club in Switzerland, also known as Yverdon Sport, Yverdon Sport Football Club, Yverdon-Sport F.C., Yverdon Sport FC, Yverdon FC, Yverdon Sport F.C.. Attributes include: 
- instance of: "association football club",
 "sports club"
- league or competition: "Swiss Super League (start time: 2023)"
- home venue: "Stade Municipal"
- sport: "association football"
- country: "Switzerland"
- inception: "1948",
 "14 Oct 1999"
- headquarters location: "Yverdon-les-Bains"
- head coach: "Paolo Tramezzani (start time: 28 Dec 2024)"
